subject: Re: Demand for Return of Deposit
body:
these are the same drawings that we have been asking for for over 6 weeks,, ,, doesn't it say something that they don't have them .. reply with this

----- Original Message ----
From: "dkiesq@aol.com" <dkiesq@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, December 28, 2006 8:09:41 PM
Subject: Fw: Demand for Return of Deposit

Fyi

Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld  



-----Original Message-----

From: "Bob Behling" <rbehling@edsaplan.com>

Date: Thu, 28 Dec 2006 19:21:54 

To:<DKIESQ@aol.com>

Subject: Re: Demand for Return of Deposit



Darren,  Yes we did speak and I indicated that since I did not have the drawings in question in front of me, I would gather them and get them to Jeffery.  That is in progress.  I am not taking the issue lightly since we have invested heavy in the process, but many of my group have been gone for the holidays, and I need assistance in compiling a complete. package.  I hope this matter can be cleared up the 1st week in Jan.  Regards,  Bob 



-----Original Message-----

From: DKIESQ@aol.com <DKIESQ@aol.com>

To: Bob Behling

Sent: Wed Dec 27 15:00:38 2006

Subject: Demand for Return of Deposit



Mr. Bob Behling

EDSA

 

Dear Mr. Behling:

 

I understand that Jeffrey Epstein sent you an e-mail nearly two weeks ago summarizing his many complaints with your firm's woefully inadequate performance and requesting the return of his deposit by the end of 2006.  I was surprised to learn today that you neither returned his deposit nor responded to his e-mail.  As your silence appears to confirm, you have no justification whatsoever to keep that deposit.  On behalf of Mr. Epstein and LSJ, LLC the immediate return of that deposit is demanded.  

 

It would be my preference to resolve this matter amicably, but, as you must know, we are prepared to proceed more formally if that becomes necessary.  

 

Please be guided accordingly. 

 

Darren K. Indyke

Attorney-At-Law

457 Madison Avenue

4th Floor

New York, New York 10022

Tel: 212-750-1176

Fax: 212-750-0381

e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

Except for personal use by the intended recipient, or as expressly authorized by the sender, any person who receives this information is prohibited from disclosing, copying, distributing, and/or using it.
